character.name: 대형 구울 v2
character.prompt: Berserk manga style grotesque massive undead ghoul brute, hulking monstrous abomination covered in dozens of eyeballs across swollen belly and shoulders, massive tumor growths with eyes inside them, grotesquely muscular with bone spikes erupting from back, giant mouth on stomach filled with teeth, face is a mass of fused skulls, enormous arms ending in jagged bone claws, dark blood oozing from every crack, apostle-like hellish monstrosity, Kentaro Miura inspired eldritch horror design
